hero.title: Because Chasing Caterers Across Instagram Shouldn't Be Your Job.
hero.subtitle: There's a reason thousands of event planners have stopped searching Instagram and started using Catery. Here's what changed.
hero.vendor_cta: Are you a catering business? Join as a vendor →

problem.title: Booking Catering Shouldn't Be This Hard

items.title: Scattered Information
items.description: Menus on Instagram. Prices on WhatsApp. Reviews somewhere. Finding a caterer means juggling five apps and hoping for the best.

items.title: Zero Transparency
items.description: No upfront pricing. No verified reviews. No way to compare. You're making a decision worth thousands of pounds — blindfolded.

items.title: Endless Back-and-Forth
items.description: Every inquiry starts from scratch. Call, wait, follow up, repeat. By the time you confirm the old way, you've lost hours you'll never get back.

problem.bottom_note: There's a better way. And thousands of event planners across Egypt have already found it.

cta.title: Make the Switch Today.
cta.subtitle: Join the event planners who've already stopped searching the old way. Catery is free on iOS & Android.
